description: Style Note Soft on the inside and sporty on the outside, you and these pants make a great pair. Designed using cotton fabric, this is perfect when you want that casual sporty look. Ideal for all your fitness, Sports training and competition needs, these tracks allow easy movement and do not lose shape even after years. While the soft fabric keeps you cool, the polyester helps you stretch with much ease. Pair it with a t-shirt from the wide range available at myntra and achieve maximum performance on and off the field. Product Details Black three fourth length pants with a mesh like fabric inside, an elasticated waistband and drawstring on the inside, two insert pockets on the sides, brand tab appliqued on the right pocket, embroidered logo on the left leg and toggle straps at the hem Material and Care Shell: 100% polyester Lining: 100% polyester Gentle machine wash in cool water Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry at low temperature Warm iron Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and waist 32&rdquo ) is wearing a size M
